title: Wi-Fi instability triage across multiple sites
content: Use this procedure when users report intermittent Wi-Fi drops at more than one site. Validate AP health, channel overlap, WAN packet loss, and DHCP lease exhaustion before escalation.
snippet: Checklist for multi-site Wi-Fi drops: AP health, channel overlap, WAN loss, and DHCP validation.

title: Network incident escalation policy
content: Escalate to network operations if packet loss stays above 2 percent for 10 minutes, if three or more branches are impacted, or if a business-critical workflow is blocked.
snippet: Escalation criteria for network incidents and cross-site outages.

title: VPN authentication troubleshooting guide
content: For repeated VPN login failures, validate identity provider availability, token expiry, and conditional access policy updates. Gather failed attempt timestamps before creating a ticket.
snippet: Troubleshooting sequence for repeated VPN authentication failures.

title: Sensor calibration recovery playbook
content: When field sensors drift or fail self-check, run calibration baseline tests, compare with prior week telemetry, and isolate hardware faults before replacement.
snippet: Playbook for diagnosing calibration drift and sensor faults.

title: Equipment shutdown response checklist
content: If an unexpected shutdown occurs, secure the area, confirm safety signals, collect controller logs, and follow restart authorization steps.
snippet: Emergency checklist for unexpected equipment shutdown events.

title: Major incident communications template
content: Template for sending Teams and email updates during active incidents. Include impact, mitigation status, next checkpoint, and owner.
snippet: Standard communication template for high-urgency incidents.
